xwikidoc.name: MCPServerConfigSheet
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.content:
{{velocity}} #set ($redirect = $xwiki.relativeRequestURL) #set ($configDocRef = 'AI.MCP.Code.MCPServerConfig') #set ($configClassName = 'AI.MCP.Code.MCPServerConfigClass') #set ($configDoc = $xwiki.getDocument($configDocRef)) #set ($configObject = $configDoc.getObject($configClassName)) #set ($isMainWiki = $services.wiki.currentWikiId == $services.wiki.mainWikiId) ## Auto-create the XObject on first access (e.g. after installing the extension without defaults) #if ($xcontext.action == 'admin' && "$!configObject" == '') #set ($configObject = $configDoc.newObject($configClassName)) #set ($discard = $configDoc.save('Created MCP server configuration', true)) #end ## Seed the displayed default for the unset enabled switch on subwikis (unticked). The main wiki manages ## enable/disable through the dashboard below and does not render this switch. The Java reader remains the ## source of truth at request time; this only affects the subwiki admin form display. #if (!$isMainWiki && "$!configObject" != '' && "$!configObject.getProperty('enabled').value" == '') #set ($discard = $configObject.set('enabled', 0)) #end #set ($configClass = $xwiki.getDocument($configClassName).getxWikiClass()) {{html clean="false"}}
#if (!$isMainWiki)
$configClass.get('enabled').getHint()
{{/html}}$configObject.display('enabled', 'edit'){{html clean="false"}}
#end
$configClass.get('serverName').getHint()
{{/html}}$configObject.display('serverName', 'edit'){{html clean="false"}}
$configClass.get('serverDescription').getHint()
{{/html}}$configObject.display('serverDescription', 'edit'){{html clean="false"}}
{{/html}} ## Farm dashboard: shown only on the main wiki. Lists every wiki with a checkbox reflecting its real MCP ## enabled state and applies the chosen states in one action. The cross-wiki write is gated per wiki in ## $services.mcp. #if ($isMainWiki) ## The admin section id of the per-wiki MCP config. MUST match the displayInSection value of the ## ConfigurableClass object in AI.MCP.Code.MCPServerConfig (currently "MCP Server"). If the Configure ## links 404 after deploy, this is the only value to adjust. #set ($mcpSectionId = 'MCP Server') ## Handle the apply POST in place. Require POST so this state change is never reachable via a GET (which ## would leak the CSRF token through the URL in logs/Referer and run on link prefetch). #if ($request.method == 'POST' && $request.get('do') == 'mcpApply') #if (!$services.csrf.isTokenValid($request.get('form_token'))) {{error}}$services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.error.csrf'){{/error}} #else #set ($result = $services.mcp.applyEnabled($request.getParameterValues('mcpManaged'), $request.getParameterValues('mcpEnabled'))) #if ($result.skipped > 0) {{info}}$services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.status.applied.skipped', [$result.changed, $result.skipped]){{/info}} #else {{info}}$services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.status.applied', [$result.changed]){{/info}} #end #end #end == $services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.heading') == $services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.intro') {{html clean="false"}}
#foreach ($w in $services.wiki.getAll()) #set ($wikiName = "$!w.prettyName") #if ($wikiName == '') #set ($wikiName = $w.id) #end #set ($canAdmin = $services.mcp.canAdmin($w.id)) #set ($enabled = $services.mcp.isEnabled($w.id)) #end
$escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.column.enabled')) $escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.column.wiki')) $escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.column.configure'))
#if ($canAdmin)#else#if ($enabled)$escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.status.enabled'))#else$escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.status.disabled'))#end#end $escapetool.xml($wikiName) #if ($canAdmin)#set ($configRef = $services.model.createDocumentReference($w.id, 'XWiki', 'XWikiPreferences'))$escapetool.xml($services.localization.render('AI.MCP.Code.dashboard.configure.link'))#end
{{/html}} #end {{/velocity}}
